title: Final Critique and Portfolio Submission

video.note: Students build a castle environment in Unreal Engine while recording daily screen/camera evidence for a making-of documentary.

learningTarget: I can prepare final castle evidence and organize documentary footage into a clear making-of story.

bellRinger.prompt: What should the final documentary prove about your process, not just your finished castle?

vocabulary.definition: A dated record of what was built, what was captured, what changed, and what needs to happen next.
Video captured from the computer screen to show workflow, testing, or before/after changes.
Camera or screen-recorded evidence that shows how a project was made.
Supporting footage that helps explain a process, place, detail, or action.
The Q3 Unreal scene students build, refine, walk through, and document.

slides.title: Q3 Lesson 16 - Final Critique and Portfolio Submission

assignment.title: Castle Documentary and Portfolio Submission
evidenceRequired: Final castle screenshots or walkthrough link.
Organized documentary evidence folder or edited documentary draft link.
Final production reflection describing the castle build process.
Production log summary for the Q3 project.

exitTicket: What is the strongest evidence that shows your growth during this project?
